changes: Replaced verbose generic skill with concise, prescriptive format targeting both task types
Added exact JSON schema examples for daily_plan.json and priority_report.json
Added explicit field-level rules (exact task names, non-overlapping blocks, buffer >= 15%)
Added categorization rules for prioritize-tasks (must_do_today = deadline today + high impact, deferred = far deadline + low impact)
Removed generic planning advice, decision frameworks, and markdown output format in favor of JSON-focused instructions
